name: 17" Light and Sound Candy Bowl Cauldron Outdoor Halloween Decorative Prop - Hyde and EEK! Boutique™
description:
Give trick-or-treaters a dose of fright and delight with this Light and Sound Candy Bowl Cauldron Outdoor Halloween Decorative Prop from Hyde and EEK! Boutique™. Designed as a black cauldron with flames, a skull base and green potion leaking out of the top, this candy bowl lights up and makes creepy sounds for extra Halloween fun. It's powered by an outdoor-safe UL adapter, making it ideal for placement on your porch, and it features a 6-hour on/18-hour off timer for convenient use.

Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Thrilling delights. Curious oddities.
